sqlMap.select:
select c.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then c.displayname else c.displayname2 end as dept_name, c.level as dept_level, c.has_sub as has_sub from ( select b.*, case when (select count(d.cn) from tbl_deptmaster d where b.cn = d.extensionattribute1 and b.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub, #level# as dept_level from tbl_deptmaster b where b.cn = #companyId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId#
union
select a.*, case when (select count(e.cn) from tbl_deptmaster e where a.cn = e.extensionattribute1 and e.cn <> e.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = e.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub, (#level# + 1) as dept_level from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #companyId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c order by dept_level, lpad(ifnull(extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), displayname
select dept_cd_path from tbl_deptmaster where cn = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and b.cn <> b.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 order by lpad(ifnull(a.extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), a.displayname
select * from tbl_cabinet_admin_modules where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and active_status = 1 order by module_type desc
select * from tbl_cabinet_user_modules where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by module_type desc

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id, module_type from tbl_cabinet_user_modules where user_id = #userId# and module_type = #moduleType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cabinet_user_modules (user_id, company_id, module_type, active_status, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #moduleType#, #activeStatus#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cabinet_user_modules set active_status = #activeStatus# where user_id = #userId# and module_type = #moduleType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cabinet_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id from tbl_cabinet_config where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cabinet_config (user_id, company_id, list_count, preview_mode, content_wpercent, content_hpercent, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #listCount#, #prevMode#, #contentWPrev#, #contentHPrev#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cabinet_config set preview_mode = #prevMode#, list_count = #listCount#, content_wpercent = #contentWPrev#, content_hpercent = #contentHPrev# where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
